MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-02-2023 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF PATRICIA MARAMONTE'S MOTION FOR TRIAL PREFERENCE WAS HEARD. HARITA NANDIVADA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF PATRICIA MARAMONTE IN PERSON. THEONA ZHORDANIA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS UNUM GROUP AND UNUM LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA IN PERSON. ELIZABETH VANN, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT RICARDO LARA AS COMMISSIONER OF THE DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE VIA COURTCALL. ARGUED AND THE COURT CONTINUED THE MOTION TO MAY-10-2023 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PARTIES TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL INFORMATION. PARTIES MAY FILE SIMULTANEOUSLY BY 05/08/23 WITH COURTESY COPIES TO BE LODGED WITH DEPT. 206. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; COURT REPORTER: CHRISTA YAN, CSR #14316, TEL.: 888/813-2009, EMAIL: YANCHRISTA@YAHOO.COM (206)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-02-2023 HEARING RE: 1.) DEFENDANTS UNUM GROUP, AND UNUM LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA'S MOTION TO SEVER PLAINTIFF'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE AGAINST RICARDO LARA AS COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE, AND 2.) DEFENDANT RICARDO LARA'S JOINDER TO DEFENDANTS UNUM GROUP AND UNUM LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA'S MOTION TO SEVER, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULINGS. THE HEARING ON "DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO SEVER" IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR TO PERMIT THE PRESIDING JUDGE TO RULE IN DEPARTMENT 206 ON PLAINTIFF'S FIRST-FILED MOTION FOR TRIAL PREFERENCE. PLAINTIFF'S PREFERENCE MOTION SEEKS A TRIAL WITHIN 120 DAYS, AND BOTH SIDES SAY THEY DESIRE EXPEDITION AND ECONOMY. (MEMO. 2:17; OPP. 5:13.) THUS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DECISION IS A GATING ITEM. A STATUS CONFERENCE WILL BE HELD IN DEPARTMENT 302 AT 9:30 A.M. ON MAY 16, 2023. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: DINA THOMPSON, CSR NO. 9693, EMAIL: CSR.DINATHOMPSON@GMAIL.COM, TEL: 707-592-7733 (302/RBU)

Off Calendar May-16-2023 Text Ruling

Defendants Unum Group And Unum Life Insurance Company Of America'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever Plaintiff'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate Against Ricardo Lara As Commissioner Of The California Department Of Insurance
Off Calendar May-02-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. AZIN JALALI, Esq. of Pillsbury & Coleman, LLP (Tel: 415-433-8000) for plaintiff;
Atty. CHARLES A. DANAHER, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton LLP (Tel: 619-338-6500) for defendants Unum Group and Unum Life Insurance Company of America;
Atty. ELIZABETH VANN, Esq. of California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 619-738-5266) for defendant Ricardo Lara as Commisioner of the Department of Insurance (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS UNUM GROUP, and UNUM LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA's Motion To Sever Plaintiff's Petition For Writ Of Mandate Against Ricardo Lara As Commissioner Of The California Department Of Insurance.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The hearing on "defendants' motion to sever" is ordered off calendar to permit the presiding judge to rule in Department 206 on plaintiff's first-filed motion for trial preference. Plaintiff's preference motion seeks a trial within 120 days, and both sides say they desire expedition and economy. (Memo. 2:17; Opp. 5:13.) Thus, the presiding judge's decision is a gating item. A status conference will be held in Department 302 at 9:30 a.m. on May 16, 2023.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Dina Thompson, CSR No. 9693, Email: csr.dinathompson@gmail.com, Tel: 707-592-7733 (302/RBU)
